keywords.job: I am the owner of this tavern.
keywords.tavern: This tavern is called the 'Old Scarab's Shell'.
keywords.name: My name is Arito.
keywords.pharaoh: Our pharaoh is our father, shepherd and teacher.
keywords.tibianus: A foolish king who resides over foolish mortals.
keywords.army: Our army is strong and unyielding.
keywords.ferumbras: This servant of evil won't even dare to enter our city and to call the wrath of our pharaoh upon him.
keywords.arena: The arena is located close to the centre of Ankrahmun.
keywords.excalibug: Our pharaoh does not have any use for such a weapon. Powerful though it may be, it is nothing compared to his divine power.
keywords.thais: Thais is the capital of an insolent realm. Its people embrace life without understanding the alternative.
keywords.tibia: Why, this is our world of course.
keywords.carlin: Carlin is the twin sister of Thais. Another city that has not found the true path yet.
keywords.news: I've heard some blasphemous adventurers have excavated one of the ancient burial sites in the desert.
keywords.rumors: I've heard some blasphemous adventurers have excavated one of the ancient burial sites in the desert.
keywords.darama: This is our continent. Ankrahmun is its biggest and most marvelous city.
keywords.daraman: I know little about his heretic teachings.
keywords.ankrahmun: Our city is a marvel. It is the envy of the whole world.
keywords.city: Our city is a marvel. It is the envy of the whole world.
keywords.arkhothep: Our pharaoh is our father, shepherd and teacher.
keywords.mortality: Mortality keeps us from finding our way to ascension.
keywords.ascension: For us mortals ascension is but a distant dream.
keywords.Akh'rah: The Akh'rah Uthun is what constitutes our self.
keywords.Uthun: The Akh'rah Uthun is what constitutes our self.
keywords.Akh: The Akh is our body, both in death and in life.
keywords.Rah: The Rah is our lifeforce. It is the source of our inner light.
keywords.uthun: The Uthun is what we learn and remember.
keywords.mourn: Mortality is a curse. That is why mortals have to be mourned.
keywords.palace: The residence of our beloved pharaoh can be found to the south of the arena.
keywords.temple: The temple is to the east, not far from the shore.
keywords.buy: I can offer you bread, cheese, ham or meat.
keywords.offer: I can offer you bread, cheese, ham or meat.
keywords.do: I can offer you bread, cheese, ham or meat.
keywords.you: I can offer you bread, cheese, ham or meat.
keywords.sell: I can offer you bread, cheese, ham or meat.
keywords.have: I can offer you bread, cheese, ham or meat.
keywords.food: Looking for food? I have lemonade, wine, water, bread, cheese, ham, meat and fish.

texts: I am the owner of this tavern.

entries.response: I am sorry, but you do not have enough gold.
